description: Quick links to all monitoring, admin, and visibility pages

options.content:
| Dashboard | Description |
|---|---|
| [Approval Queue](http://100.81.93.12:3000/d/approval-queue) | Review and approve AI-generated content |
| [Pipeline Operations](http://100.81.93.12:3000/d/pipeline-operations) | Task status, throughput, stuck task detection |
| [Quality & Content](http://100.81.93.12:3000/d/quality-content) | Quality score trends, pass rates, topic quality |
| [Cost & Analytics](http://100.81.93.12:3000/d/cost-analytics) | LLM spend, electricity costs, budget tracking |
| [Infrastructure & Data](http://100.81.93.12:3000/d/infrastructure-data) | Hardware metrics, audit log, raw DB tables |

| Service | URL | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| Grafana | [localhost:3000](http://100.81.93.12:3000) | Dashboards, alerts, monitoring |
| Prometheus | [localhost:9091](http://100.81.93.12:9091) | Metrics scraping (GPU, system, worker) |
| Gitea | [localhost:3001](http://100.81.93.12:3001) | Self-hosted Git repos |
| Woodpecker CI | [localhost:8280](http://100.81.93.12:8280) | CI/CD pipelines |
| pgAdmin | [localhost:5480](http://100.81.93.12:5480) | PostgreSQL web UI |
| Worker API | [localhost:8002](http://100.81.93.12:8002/api/health) | Pipeline backend (FastAPI) |

| Endpoint | URL | Auth | Purpose |
|---|---|---|---|
| Health | [/api/health](http://100.81.93.12:8002/api/health) | No | Full service status |
| Metrics | [/api/metrics](http://100.81.93.12:8002/api/metrics) | No | Task counts, success rate, avg time |
| Operational | [/api/metrics/operational](http://100.81.93.12:8002/api/metrics/operational) | Token | Queue depth, executor stats, uptime |
| Budget | [/api/metrics/costs/budget](http://100.81.93.12:8002/api/metrics/costs/budget) | Token | Monthly spend vs budget |
| Prometheus | [/api/prometheus](http://100.81.93.12:8002/api/prometheus) | No | Prometheus-format metrics |
| Settings | [/api/settings](http://100.81.93.12:8002/api/settings) | Token | All pipeline settings |
| Pipeline Events | [/api/pipeline/events](http://100.81.93.12:8002/api/pipeline/events) | Token | Pipeline event log |
| Pipeline Dashboard | [/pipeline](http://100.81.93.12:8002/pipeline) | No | HTML pipeline overview |
| Memory Dashboard | [/memory](http://100.81.93.12:8002/memory) | No | HTML memory/knowledge overview |

| Service | URL | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| Public Site | [gladlabs.io](https://www.gladlabs.io) | Production Next.js frontend |
| Vercel Dashboard | [vercel.com/dashboard](https://vercel.com/dashboard) | Deployments, env vars, logs |
| RSS Feed | [gladlabs.io/feed.xml](https://www.gladlabs.io/feed.xml) | JSON Feed 1.1 + feed.xml (post-GH-36: direct Bluesky/Mastodon publishing, no dlvr.it) |
| Static CDN | [R2 bucket](https://pub-1432fdefa18e47ad98f213a8a2bf14d5.r2.dev/static/manifest.json) | Static JSON export manifest |

title: Link Registry
